body:
This ~~WIP~~ PR adds Test Case 3 to our suite of Shallow-water test cases in `shallow_water.jl`. 

The description of the test case can be found in Williamson "A standard test set for numerical approximations to the shallow water equations in spherical geometry", 1992.

This modifies the Initial Condition only, not the governing equations set in the `rhs` function, which is the same for all test cases.
title: Shallow-water Test Case 3: Steady State Geostrophic Flow with Compact Support
